allow:
Bash(python -c "
import asyncio
import time
import httpx

async def test():
    async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=60.0) as client:
        # Cold request
        print(''=== Request 1: Cold (no history) ==='')
        start = time.perf_counter()
        resp = await client.post(''http://localhost:8000/api/v1/query'', 
            json={
                ''query'': ''Next train from Narre Warren to Flinders Street'',
                ''session_id'': ''spec-test'',
                ''query_history'': []
            })
        elapsed = (time.perf_counter() - start) * 1000
        r = resp.json()
        print(f''Type: {r[""data""][""type""]}'')
        print(f''Latency: {elapsed:.0f}ms'')
        learned = r.get(''learned_stop'')
        print(f''Learned: {learned}'')
        
        # Warm request with learned history
        if learned:
            print()
            print(''=== Request 2: Warm (with history) ==='')
            start = time.perf_counter()
            resp = await client.post(''http://localhost:8000/api/v1/query'', 
                json={
                    ''query'': ''Next train from Narre Warren'',
                    ''session_id'': ''spec-test'',
                    ''query_history'': [learned]
                })
            elapsed = (time.perf_counter() - start) * 1000
            r = resp.json()
            print(f''Type: {r[""data""][""type""]}'')
            print(f''Latency: {elapsed:.0f}ms'')

asyncio.run(test())
")
